1	import type { PageLoad } from './$types'
2	import { createClient } from '$lib/gql/client'
3	import { gql } from 'graphql-request'
4	
5	const RUN_DETAIL_QUERY = gql`
6		query RunDetail($id: ID!) {
7			run(id: $id) {
8				id
9				layer
10				status
11				projectID
12				beadId
13				artifactId
14				parentRunId
15				childRunIds
16				startedAt
17				completedAt
18				durationMs
19	
20				queueInputs
21				stopCondition
22				selectedBeadIds
23	
24				baseRevision
25				resultRevision
26				worktreePath
27				mergeOutcome
28				checkResults
29	
30				harness
31				provider
32				model
33				promptSummary
34				powerMin
35				powerMax
36				tokensIn
37				tokensOut
38				costUsd
39				outputExcerpt
40				evidenceLinks
41			}
42		}
43	`
44	
45	export interface RunDetail {
46		id: string
47		layer: string
48		status: string
49		projectID: string | null
50		beadId: string | null
51		artifactId: string | null
52		parentRunId: string | null
53		childRunIds: string[]
54		startedAt: string | null
55		completedAt: string | null
56		durationMs: number | null
57	
58		queueInputs: string | null
59		stopCondition: string | null
60		selectedBeadIds: string[] | null
61	
62		baseRevision: string | null
63		resultRevision: string | null
64		worktreePath: string | null
65		mergeOutcome: string | null
66		checkResults: string | null
67	
68		harness: string | null
69		provider: string | null
70		model: string | null
71		promptSummary: string | null
72		powerMin: number | null
73		powerMax: number | null
74		tokensIn: number | null
75		tokensOut: number | null
76		costUsd: number | null
77		outputExcerpt: string | null
78		evidenceLinks: string[] | null
79	}
80	
81	const PARENT_RUN_QUERY = gql`
82		query ParentRunParent($id: ID!) {
83			run(id: $id) {
84				parentRunId
85			}
86		}
87	`
88	
89	const PRODUCED_ARTIFACT_QUERY = gql`
90		query ProducedArtifact($projectID: ID!, $id: ID!) {
91			artifact(projectID: $projectID, id: $id) {
92				id
93				title
94			}
95		}
96	`
97	
98	export interface ProducedArtifact {
99		id: string
100		title: string
101	}
102	
103	export const load: PageLoad = async ({ params, fetch }) => {
104		const client = createClient(fetch as unknown as typeof globalThis.fetch)
105		const data = await client.request<{ run: RunDetail | null }>(RUN_DETAIL_QUERY, {
106			id: params.runId
107		})
108	
109		let grandparentRunId: string | null = null
110		if (data.run?.layer === 'run' && data.run.parentRunId) {
111			const parentData = await client.request<{ run: { parentRunId: string | null } | null }>(
112				PARENT_RUN_QUERY,
113				{ id: data.run.parentRunId }
114			)
115			grandparentRunId = parentData.run?.parentRunId ?? null
116		}
117	
118		let producedArtifact: ProducedArtifact | null = null
119		if (data.run?.artifactId) {
120			try {
121				const artData = await client.request<{ artifact: ProducedArtifact | null }>(
122					PRODUCED_ARTIFACT_QUERY,
123					{ projectID: params.projectId, id: data.run.artifactId }
124				)
125				producedArtifact = artData.artifact
126			} catch {
127				producedArtifact = null
128			}
129		}
130	
131		return {
132			nodeId: params.nodeId,
133			projectId: params.projectId,
134			runId: params.runId,
135			run: data.run,
136			grandparentRunId,
137			producedArtifact
138		}
139	}
140

1 import type { PageLoad } from './$types' 2 import { createClient } from '$lib/gql/client' 3 import { gql } from 'graphql-request' 4 5 const ARTIFACT_DETAIL_QUERY = gql` 6 query ArtifactDetail($projectID: ID!, $id: ID!) { 7 artifact(projectID: $projectID, id: $id) { 8 id 9 path 10 title 11 mediaType 12 staleness 13 description 14 updatedAt 15 ddxFrontmatter 16 content 17 generatedBy { 18 runId 19 promptSummary 20 sourceHashMatch 21 } 22 } 23 } 24 ` 25 26 const RUN_EXISTS_QUERY = gql` 27 query RunExists($id: ID!) { 28 run(id: $id) { 29 id 30 } 31 } 32 ` 33 34 export interface ArtifactGeneratedBy { 35 runId: string 36 promptSummary: string 37 sourceHashMatch: boolean 38 } 39 40 export interface ArtifactDetail { 41 id: string 42 path: string 43 title: string 44 mediaType: string 45 staleness: string 46 description: string | null 47 updatedAt: string | null 48 ddxFrontmatter: string | null 49 content: string | null 50 generatedBy: ArtifactGeneratedBy | null 51 } 52 53 interface ArtifactDetailResult { 54 artifact: ArtifactDetail | null 55 } 56 57 export const load: PageLoad = async ({ params, url, fetch }) => { 58 const client = createClient(fetch as unknown as typeof globalThis.fetch) 59 const data = await client.request(ARTIFACT_DETAIL_QUERY, { 60 projectID: params.projectId, 61 id: decodeURIComponent(params.artifactId) 62 }) 63 64 // Build content URL for binary types (images, PDFs, unknown). 65 // The UI uses this URL for , , and download links. 66 const contentUrl = data.artifact 67 ? `/api/projects/${encodeURIComponent(params.projectId)}/artifact-content?path=${encodeURIComponent(data.artifact.path)}` 68 : null 69 70 // Preserve back-link state so the detail page can return to the filtered list. 71 const back = url.searchParams.get('back') ?? null 72 73 // Probe whether the producing run exists, so the UI can disable the link 74 // (with tooltip) when the run id is unknown. 75 let runExists = false 76 const gb = data.artifact?.generatedBy 77 if (gb?.runId) { 78 try { 79 const probe = await client.request<{ run: { id: string } | null }>(RUN_EXISTS_QUERY, { 80 id: gb.runId 81 }) 82 runExists = probe.run != null 83 } catch { 84 runExists = false 85 } 86 } 87 88 return { 89 nodeId: params.nodeId, 90 projectId: params.projectId, 91 artifactId: params.artifactId, 92 artifact: data.artifact, 93 contentUrl, 94 back, 95 runExists 96 } 97 } 98

docs
README.md

"""RunLayer identifies which layer of the work/try/run hierarchy a Run belongs to"""
enum RunLayer {
  """Top-level queue drain: encompasses one or more try attempts"""
  work
  """Single bead attempt: encompasses one or more run invocations"""
  try
  """Single agent invocation with a specific harness/model"""
  run
}

"""
Run is a record in the three-layer work→try→run substrate from the FEAT-010
agent execute workflow. It is distinct from ExecutionRun (definition-driven
check/benchmark results) and Execution (execute-bead bundle).
"""
type Run implements Node {
  """Stable identifier for this run record"""
  id: ID!
  """Which layer this record belongs to"""
  layer: RunLayer!
  """Current status (pending, running, success, failure, preserved)"""
  status: String!
  """Project ID this run belongs to (set for all runs; enables combined cross-project views)"""
  projectID: String
  """When the run started"""
  startedAt: DateTime
  """When the run completed (null if still running)"""
  completedAt: DateTime
  """Bead ID associated with this run (null for work-layer records with multiple beads)"""
  beadId: String
  """Artifact ID produced by this run (null if none)"""
  artifactId: String
  """Parent run ID (null for top-level work records)"""
  parentRunId: String
  """IDs of child runs (try records for work, run records for try)"""
  childRunIds: [String!]!

  # ── Work-layer fields (populated when layer = work) ────────────────────
  """Raw queue inputs as JSON (work layer only)"""
  queueInputs: JSON
  """Stop condition for the queue drain (work layer only)"""
  stopCondition: String
  """Bead IDs selected for this queue drain (work layer only)"""
  selectedBeadIds: [String!]

  # ── Try-layer fields (populated when layer = try) ──────────────────────
  """Git revision the try attempt started from (try layer only)"""

data.text:
Committed `44c5014a`.

**Evidence vs AC:**
1. Bead detail linked runs → `BeadDetail.svelte` Linked Runs section + new `beadRuns` GraphQL fetch in `+page.ts`.
2. Run detail bead links → already present in `runs/[runId]/+page.svelte` (header bead link + work-layer selectedBeadIds links).
3. Run-layer artifact link → `produced-artifact` link already wired with `producedArtifact` query.
4. Artifact "View producing run" link → already live in `artifacts/[artifactId]/+page.svelte` via `runExists` probe.
5. Combined runs list carries projectId → `nodes/[nodeId]/runs/+page.svelte:69-71` (`runDetailHref` uses `run.projectID`).
6. `runs.spec.ts` covers list filter→work drill→try drill→run drill, work/try/run field assertions, artifact link assertion, breadcrumb-up navigation, browser-back filter restoration, and bead-linked-runs click navigation.

Svelte-check: 0 errors.
